description_long: This is a classic wooden baseball bat with a natural light wood finish and a slightly tapered cylindrical shape. The barrel is thick and rounded, gradually narrowing toward the handle, which features a subtle knob at the end for grip security. A darker band encircles the bat near the transition from barrel to handle, adding a touch of visual contrast. The surface appears smooth and polished, with no visible cracks, dents, or significant wear. There are no visible logos, text, or decorative markings on the barrel or handle. The bat is well-proportioned and typical of those used in recreational or professional baseball settings.
description: A smooth, light wood baseball bat with a tapered shape, dark accent band, and a knobbed handle. No visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, the dark accent band, and the smooth, polished wood surface.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, highlighting the knob and the slender grip area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the full length and the dark accent band.
description_view_3: Barrel-end view, displaying the rounded, thick barrel and the transition to the handle.
